positive: A whimsical, minimalist geometric design of a soaring owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl is rendered in clean, deep indigo and gold line art, composed of interconnected geometric shapes like triangles and circles. The moon and background elements are solid cream and soft slate gray. Style: modern celestial tattoo art, stenciled silhouette, linocut woodblock print aesthetic. Composition: Central, vertically oriented, highly detailed edges, strong contrast, perfect for apparel placement. Lighting: Soft, ethereal backlight highlighting the clean cuts and edges. Focus: Sharp details, clean separation of colors/tones. Aspect Ratio: Square, graphic design focus.
negative: blur, noise, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, fuzzy, low detail, extra limbs, poorly drawn anatomy, jpeg artifacts, cartoon, photo, realistic, gradient, messy, messy edges
